title: Path Detective: Recover a Moved Community Site
summary: Repair a project that lost resources after a handoff by exposing real extensions, reading its tree, and replacing machine-specific paths.
objectives: Interpret a project tree and distinguish filenames, extensions, folders, and paths.
Choose and verify relative references that survive moving the project root.

steps.title: Read the real filename · community-site handoff
steps.instruction: In the community-site handoff, the file manager shows schedule.html, but its type is Plain Text and hidden extensions are enabled. What should be checked?
steps.why: Portable paths preserve the relationship between project resources when the containing folder moves. Working through read the real filename narrows the community-site handoff while you inspect the artifact.

content.title: Read the real filename — community-site handoff
content.text: Commit to the claim that explains the community-site handoff evidence without assigning work to the wrong layer.

hints: During community-site handoff inspect, identify which project paths boundary “Read the real filename” asks about.
Compare every community-site handoff option with the named “Read the real filename” evidence during inspect.
For community-site handoff inspect, reject claims that skip a required layer or invent unavailable evidence for “Read the real filename.”

options.text: Rename the containing folder to HTML so the operating system changes the file type.
Reveal full extensions because the file may actually be schedule.html.txt.
Assume the browser ignores extensions and opens every file as HTML.

stimulus.title: Community notice handoff · community-site handoff
stimulus.caption: The delivered project tree and the path currently written in notice.html. Case: community-site handoff; focus: read the real filename.

steps.title: Locate a failure · community-site handoff
steps.instruction: In the community-site handoff, the file bytes are read, but no browser process starts. Which boundary should be investigated next?
steps.why: Separating system responsibilities makes a visible symptom traceable to the layer that can cause it. Working through locate a failure narrows the community-site handoff before the result is shown.

content.title: Locate a failure — community-site handoff
content.text: Commit to the claim that explains the community-site handoff evidence without assigning work to the wrong layer.

hints: During community-site handoff predict, identify which system chain boundary “Locate a failure” asks about.
Compare every community-site handoff option with the named “Locate a failure” evidence during predict.
For community-site handoff predict, reject claims that skip a required layer or invent unavailable evidence for “Locate a failure.”

options.text: The CSS color selected by the page author.
The operating-system handoff that launches or addresses the browser application.
The monitor brightness setting, because no parsing event exists yet.

steps.title: Check letter case · community-site handoff
steps.instruction: In the community-site handoff, source requests Images/Map.svg, while the tree contains images/map.svg. What is the durable repair?
steps.why: Portable paths preserve the relationship between project resources when the containing folder moves. Working through check letter case narrows the community-site handoff as you connect the explanation to evidence.

content.text: A project is a directory tree. A filename includes its real extension, and a relative path describes one resource from the current document location. Keeping related resources inside the project and testing after moving the whole folder exposes machine-specific absolute paths and case mismatches. Apply this distinction during the community-site handoff read task.

hints: During community-site handoff read, identify which project paths boundary “Check letter case” asks about.
Compare every community-site handoff option with the named “Check letter case” evidence during read.
For community-site handoff read, reject claims that skip a required layer or invent unavailable evidence for “Check letter case.”

options.text: Add spaces until both strings have the same character count.
Make the path casing exactly match the directory and filename casing.
Depend on all servers treating differently cased paths as identical.

steps.title: Rebuild system chain · community-site handoff
steps.instruction: Within the community-site handoff, reconstruct the system chain in causal order.
steps.why: Separating system responsibilities makes a visible symptom traceable to the layer that can cause it. Ordering the community-site handoff exposes its first unsupported causal handoff.

content.text: Do not order by vocabulary or visual position. Test whether each event creates the conditions required by the next event in the community-site handoff.

hints: In the community-site handoff sequence, locate the first event whose required input is not ready.
Separate community-site handoff system chain events from later visible outcomes.
Rebuild the community-site handoff sequence one causal handoff at a time.

options.text: Input hardware reports the open-file action
The operating system reads document bytes from storage
The browser parses the received bytes and prepares output
Graphics hardware and the display produce visible pixels

steps.title: Choose a portable reference · community-site handoff
steps.instruction: In the community-site handoff, which source value survives moving community-notice as one folder?
steps.why: Portable paths preserve the relationship between project resources when the containing folder moves. Working through choose a portable reference narrows the community-site handoff while you inspect the artifact.

options.text: /home/lee/Desktop/map.svg
images/map.svg
C:\Users\Lee\map.svg

stimulus.title: Community notice handoff · community-site handoff
stimulus.caption: The delivered project tree and the path currently written in notice.html. Case: community-site handoff; focus: choose a portable reference.

steps.title: Interpret the trace · community-site handoff
steps.instruction: In the community-site handoff, what does the read event establish?
steps.why: Separating system responsibilities makes a visible symptom traceable to the layer that can cause it. Working through interpret the trace narrows the community-site handoff while you defend the selected claim.

options.text: The browser permanently rewrote the file as soon as the pointer was clicked.
The operating system supplied stored document bytes before browser parsing began.
The display requested HTML tags directly from storage.

steps.title: Diagnose the moved image · community-site handoff
steps.instruction: In the community-site handoff, why does the current source reference fail on another learner’s computer?
steps.why: Portable paths preserve the relationship between project resources when the containing folder moves. Working through diagnose the moved image narrows the community-site handoff before the result is shown.

options.text: SVG files can only load from a desktop folder.
It names one user’s absolute machine location instead of the project-relative image location.
The browser requires every image to be copied into the HTML source text.

steps.title: Write the evidence note · community-site handoff
steps.instruction: Write a concise case note for the community-site handoff. Explain the mechanism, cite observed evidence, and reject one plausible alternative.
steps.why: Explaining the community-site handoff from memory exposes gaps that selected answers can hide. Cite the mechanism and its evidence.

content.title: Transfer brief
content.text: A teammate must be able to reproduce your conclusion without seeing the earlier answer choices. Name evidence and limits, not only the final verdict.

hints: Start the community-site handoff case note with the earliest observed event.
Use these community-site handoff technical anchors where they fit: folder, relative path, extension, operating system, browser.
Close the community-site handoff note by naming one alternative and the evidence that rules it out.
